chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1025 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on CMA No.3712/2022 (Ex./A) 3. For hearing of main case 05.04.2023 Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-Pakistan Railways. Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Ghazanfar Ali, Senior Auditor, Pakistan Railways Sukkur is present and submits an original cheque bearing No. B138823 dated 15.02.2023, amounting to Rs.1,973,783.00 (Rupees one million nine hundred seventy three thousand seven hundred eighty three), being full amount of commutation of the petitioner. Since the petitioner is not in attendance, the Accountant of this Court is directed to retain the said cheque and handover the same to the petitioner after proper verification and identification as per rules. So far the grievance of the petitioner with regard to retaining the Railway quarter is concerned, since his service benefits have been paid by the Pakistan Railways, he should vacate the same within three months hereof. In case of failure, the respondents shall be at liberty to get the Railway quarter vacated as per the policy. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
